name: Praline Bars
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup (1 1/2 sticks) butter OR Margarine, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the butter with half of the sugar and half of the vanilla using an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add flour to the mixture, stirring on low speed until combined.
3. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 13 x 9 inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 23 minutes, or until lightly browned.
5. In another large bowl, mix the cream cheese with the remaining sugar and vanilla using an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
6. Add eggs to the mixture and stir well.
7. Fold in the almond brittle chips.
8. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the crust.
9. Dot the top of the cream cheese mixture with caramel topping.
10. Return the pan to the oven and bake at 350°F for an additional 30 minutes.
11. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
12. Once cooled, refrigerate and cut into bars. Makes 2 dozen. Prep time: 30 minutes Baking time: 30 minutes.
